---
name: Standard Issue
about: Use this template for all feature, infrastructure, and refactoring issues
title: 'type: short descriptive title'
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Context

One paragraph: what part of the project this is about, why it matters, how it
fits into the larger picture. Reference the relevant section of CLAUDE.md or
the architecture document if applicable.

## Scope

What this issue covers. Be concrete about files, modules, or features. What is
NOT included is just as important as what IS included — name it explicitly.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] First condition
- [ ] Second condition
- [ ] Tests are in place and pass
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changes

## Technical notes

Optional. Specific implementation hints, references to existing code, libraries
to use, patterns to follow. Keep it short — the assignee will make
implementation decisions.

## Related

Optional. Link to related issues, PRs, or docs. Use # for issue references.
